Failed command: git diff -- src/services/promptPlanning/taskBoard.ts src/services/promptPlanning/executor.ts src/components/TaskListV2.tsx test/taskBoard.test.ts test/promptPlanExecutor.test.ts package.json
Error:

Failed command: git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ur-nexus): ensure finished/failed/skipped tasks render checked and deduplicate task boards

- taskBoard.ts now renders finished/failed/skipped tasks with a [✓] marker and
  maps their public status so they never appear as unchecked.
- executor.ts deduplicates consecutive identical task-board events, preventing
  noisy repeated boards/orphan separators.
- TaskListV2.tsx now has explicit failed (cross/error) and skipped (warning)
  icons instead of falling through to an empty UI.
- Added scheduler/status transition tests and an integration test proving
  running tasks update, completed tasks are checked, and the final board is
  clean with no duplicate separators.

Closes UI/status bugs in terminal task list.

Co-Authored-By: UR <noreply@ur.local>
EOF
)" 2>&1
